title: Jesuh Aw, Singlamteh Kisuan Khin Ta’ng

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Jesuh aw, Nang hong zui dingin, Singlamteh kisuan khinta’ng;
Nangma aa bek hi den dingin,
simmawh muhdah thuak khinta’ng.
Ka tup, ka deih ka zonsa teng, A vekpi’n beikhinta
hi;
Ahih hang ngaihsun phakik leng, Pasian na ngawn kei aa hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mi’n hong
simmawh, hong nusia-in, Honpa nangawn taisan hi;
Mi khempeuh ahoih bangkhemin, Nang tua bang na hi kei
h i.
Itna Pasian Nangmah kong zong, Nong maitaina, kei nuamna;
Tual le galin hong taisan zong,
Nong et bek zong kei nuamna.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Midangte’ hong bawlsiatna in, Na ang hong tun zawsop
hi;
Leitung nuntak haksatna in, Vantung nopna hong tun hi.
Kei Na hong it lai tengin ah, Dahnate
siatna’ng hilo;
Nang kihello lungdamna ah, lungnop kicing om thei lo.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Upna lum
tawi, thungeninah, hehpihna tawh minthang ding;
Ka mai-a vantung nopna ah, Pasian khut in hong kha
ding.
Leitung nasep bei baih dinga, Ka khualzinna bei ding hi;
Ka lam-etna tak suak dinga, Upna
kimu thei ding hi.
